message:
fix(net,service): update remaining test sites for parking_lot Mutex API

Fixes test code that still referenced std::sync::Mutex after the
crate-wide parking_lot migration:

net/tcp/listener.rs:
- poll_accept test: removes .expect("lock poisoned") on registration
  lock access (was missed in the listener migration commit).

service/layer.rs:
- TrackingLayer and TrackingService test helpers: replaces
  std::sync::Mutex with parking_lot::Mutex import.
- 9 test sites updated: .lock().unwrap() → .lock() across
  stack_applies_inner_then_outer, service_builder_applies_layers_in_order,
  stack_call_order_outer_wraps_inner, and error_propagates_through_layer_stack.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
